title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 16–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Chiffon, Unknown person #14, Reiju, Sanji as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry, Chiffon...this is such a harebrained request...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay! It's been a while since we've baked together! Besides...

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: bege! I told you, didn't I?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These are the people that saved Lola's life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's easy to just say "Thank you for saving Lola" with words.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when those you're indebted to are in trouble? That's when the real truth of that thanks is tested!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's what they always say, right, Darlin'?)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If anything should happen to me...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 23 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
